name: @workspace/asset-sweep
description: One-shot exhaustive sweep of attached_assets/. Recursively unpacks every zip, inventories every file, and extracts seed-key algorithms, CRCs, UDS service/NRC/DID dictionaries, and unlock-DLL coverage that are not yet wired into the SRT Lab artifact. Emits inventory.json, REPORT.md, and three append-only catalogs under artifacts/srt-lab/.
